final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: architectural-visualization
Asset type: professional architectural rendering, hero image
Primary request: modern minimalist villa perched on a tropical coastal cliff at golden hour
Scene/backdrop: dramatic coastal cliff overlooking tropical ocean, distant sailboats on the water, spectacular sunset sky with layered clouds
Subject: pure white fair-faced concrete structure with floor-to-ceiling glass curtain walls, infinity pool extending from terrace visually merging with sea level, water reflecting orange-red sunset glow
Style/medium: photorealistic architectural visualization, professional 3D render
Composition/framing: three-point perspective, wide establishing shot, balanced foreground-to-background depth
Lighting/mood: golden hour sunset lighting, soft warm ambient glow, dramatic sky illumination, luxurious resort atmosphere
Color palette: warm orange-red sunset reflections, pure white concrete, deep blue ocean, golden sky gradients, lush tropical greens
Materials/textures: smooth fair-faced concrete, reflective glass, rippling pool water, teak wood lounge furniture, tropical foliage
Constraints: maintain seamless indoor-outdoor visual flow, preserve infinity pool horizon illusion, keep minimalist aesthetic
Avoid: cartoonish rendering, oversaturated colors, cluttered composition, artificial lighting artifacts
